source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A person with compromised pinch strength in his fingers can exert a force of only 6.0 N to either side of a pinch-held object, such as the book shown in Figure. The coefficient of static friction between his fingers and the book cover is 0.80. What is the heaviest book he can hold vertically before it slips out of his fingers?
